name: Orange Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Break chocolate into pieces and put into a heavy bowl on top of a double boiler filled with hot water.
2. In another bowl, cream butter and confectioners' sugar.
3. Gradually stir in marmalade, Cointreau, and melted chocolate.
4. Cover the bowl with baking parchment and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
5. Dip your hands into confectioners' sugar before shaping truffles.
6. Scoop out a small chunk of the chocolate mass (about 1/2 teaspoon) and roll into a ball between your hands.
7. Press the truffle into chopped almonds, then roll once more to ensure it is completely covered with almonds.
8. Place the truffles into candy cases and store in a cool place.
Yield: 50 truffles
Preparation time: 35 minutes
Approx. 60 calories per piece (251 Joule)
